name: mdrunner
description: Render Markdown as polished, self-contained HTML and open it in the default browser.

scripts.test:source: bun test tests/unit tests/integration tests/security tests/cli
scripts.test:coverage: bun test --coverage tests/unit tests/integration tests/security tests/cli
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test:source
